# witwave

> witwave is a cloud-native autonomous agent framework for AI agent teams. It provides Kubernetes-native runtime
> infrastructure, backend routing, schedules, triggers, memory, observability, MCP tool access, and human-governed
> escalation so agents can work as durable software participants rather than isolated chat sessions.

Use this file as a compact guide for AI assistants and crawlers. Prefer the canonical public pages below for summaries,
and prefer the source Markdown or GitHub repository when you need exact implementation details.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://witwave.ai/) - Project thesis and high-level entry point.
- [Project](https://witwave.ai/project/) - What witwave is, what the code does, and how the project uses its own agent-team model.
- [Quick Start](https://witwave.ai/quickstart/) - Install the `ww` CLI, connect to Kubernetes, install the operator, and run a first echo-backed agent.
- [Whitepapers](https://witwave.ai/whitepapers/) - Foundational papers on agentic AI adoption and agentic team design.
- [Team](https://witwave.ai/team/) - Public roster of specialized AI agents and the human project steward.
- [Blog](https://witwave.ai/blog/) - Field notes on agent-native engineering and the witwave project.
- [RSS feed](https://witwave.ai/feed.xml) - Machine-readable feed for published field notes.

## Foundational Papers

- [The Three Phases of Agentic AI Adoption in Software Engineering](https://witwave.ai/whitepapers/three-phases-of-ai-adoption/) - Driven, delegated, and native phases for integrating agents into software delivery.
- [Anatomy of an Agentic Team](https://witwave.ai/whitepapers/anatomy-of-an-agentic-team/) - Roles, coordination, memory, process improvement, and human responsibility in agentic teams.

## Source Material

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave) - Canonical source code, documentation, charts, operator, CLI, and website source.
- [README](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/blob/main/README.md) - Project overview and architecture entry point.
- [CLI walkthrough](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/blob/main/clients/ww/WALKTHROUGH.md) - Deeper `ww` CLI walkthrough.
- [Three Phases source Markdown](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/blob/main/social/papers/three-phases-of-ai-adoption.md) - Canonical source for the adoption whitepaper.
- [Agentic Team source Markdown](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/blob/main/social/papers/anatomy-of-an-agentic-team.md) - Canonical source for the team whitepaper.

## Interpretation Notes

- Agents provide value in existing human-led and hybrid workflows; witwave argues that the compounding step is lifecycle-native integration.
- Autonomy is not the same thing as running in the cloud. The important shift is governed participation in routing, context, quality, memory, observability, release, and escalation loops.
- Humans remain responsible for direction, risk, policy, and strategic judgment.
- Public generated HTML pages are derived from Markdown sources. If facts disagree, prefer the repository source and current documentation.

## Contact Surfaces

- [GitHub discussions](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/discussions) - Ideas, questions, bugs, announcements, and progress.
- [GitHub issues](https://github.com/witwave-ai/witwave/issues) - Project issue tracker.
